title: Usulután Heat Wave
lead: Usulután is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.37. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Usulután is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 17.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 41%, and wind speed is moderate at 15.9 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, posing significant risks to the population and infrastructure.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
